purpose: Console-mirror artifact for the Weekly OIDC IAM trust-policy drift scan (task 4d38c8a5). Rendered by a future renderOidcDrift() panel in v7.html following the PR #4 mirror-panel pattern (llm-registry, visual-bible, openai-gates).
safety_boundary: This file must NEVER contain trust-policy JSON, CloudTrail event bodies, secrets, session tokens, or Condition values. Rule identifiers and ARN references only.

source_task.task_name: Weekly OIDC IAM trust-policy drift scan
source_task.cadence: Every Monday at 12:00 UTC (08:00 ET during EDT)

rule_A_sub_widening.short: sub allow-list widened beyond baseline or contains prohibited wildcard

rule_B_audience_regression.short: aud condition missing, non-StringEquals, or not sts.amazonaws.com

rule_C_provider_swap.short: Principal.Federated no longer matches baseline OIDC provider ARN

rule_D_condition_weakening.short: sub condition test weakened StringEquals to StringLike on non-wildcard values

rule_E_unconditional_allow.short: New Allow statement without both aud and sub conditions

baseline_missing.short: security/oidc-baseline.yaml not found on main of owning repo

console_render_hint.empty_state_copy: No live scan yet. First run 2026-07-13 08:00 ET.
console_render_hint.clean_state_copy: All scanned roles clean as of {scan_time_utc}. {scanned_role_count} role(s) audited against baselines on main.
console_render_hint.drift_state_copy: {finding_count} of {scanned_role_count} role(s) drifted. See Slack DM for diffs.
